content: Auth.js v5 (NextAuth v5) is the standard authentication library for Next.js App Router. Use Credentials provider for username/password login, JWT session strategy for stateless auth. The auth() function replaces getServerSession across App Router. Configure callbacks: jwt callback stores user data (including role) in token; session callback exposes token data to client. Middleware in middleware.ts protects routes by role. Stable release as of 2025 with extensive tutorials for Next.js 15.
